name: Nu-Med Plus, Inc.
summary: Nu-Med Plus, Inc., a medical device company, engages in the design, development, enhancement, and commercialization of medical devices worldwide. It develops a hospital nitric oxide delivery system, a clinical nitric oxide delivery system, a mobile rechargeable device to deliver nitric oxide gas, and a nitric oxide system that can be used for research applications. The company serves hospitals, health systems, and the medical community. Nu-Med Plus, Inc. was incorporated in 2011 and is headquartered in Salt Lake City, Utah.
